name: Device Diagnostics Toolkit
description: Read-only device, storage, battery, and package diagnostics for checking what Shizulu can see through shell privileges.

commands.exec: echo 'Identity:'; id; echo; echo 'Device:'; getprop ro.product.manufacturer; getprop ro.product.model; getprop ro.product.device; echo; echo 'Android:'; getprop ro.build.version.release; getprop ro.build.version.sdk; getprop ro.build.fingerprint
echo 'Mounted storage:'; df -h /data /sdcard 2>/dev/null; echo; echo 'Disk stats:'; dumpsys diskstats 2>/dev/null | head -80
echo 'Battery:'; dumpsys battery; echo; echo 'Power settings:'; settings get global low_power; settings get global adaptive_battery_management_enabled 2>/dev/null || true
echo 'User packages:'; pm list packages -3 | wc -l; echo 'System packages:'; pm list packages -s | wc -l; echo; echo 'Recently listed packages:'; pm list packages | head -120
